title: Padres de la plaza: 10 recorridos posibles
original_title: Padres de la plaza – 10 recorridos posibles
overview: Documentary that reflects on the figure of the men whose children were kidnapped and disappeared during the last military dictatorship in Argentina. Men who from the first moment shared with their wives, Mothers of the Plaza de Mayo, the search for their children, but without actually organizing themselves into a group that would provide them with a space of visible recognition for the rest of society.
